summary: Completed testing of iteration 9 features: (1) Contact form - POST /api/contact sends email to admin + copy to user, (2) Feedback form - POST /api/feedback saves to DB with feedback_id, GET /api/feedbacks returns approved feedbacks, (3) Profile picture upload - POST /api/profile/upload-picture works, picture shows in navbar, (4) Change email with OTP - send-otp and verify endpoints work, (5) Profile stats - GET /api/profile returns total_interviews and completed_interviews, (6) LiveInterview fullscreen video re-attach useEffect fixed (code formatting bug). All 19 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified working.

backend: POST /api/contact - sends email and returns success (200)
POST /api/feedback - saves feedback to DB with feedback_id (200)
GET /api/feedbacks - returns list of approved feedbacks (200)
POST /api/profile/upload-picture - uploads image and returns picture URL (200)
POST /api/profile/change-email/send-otp - sends OTP to new email (200)
GET /api/profile - returns user profile with interview stats (200)
GET /api/profile - includes created_at for member since
frontend: Landing page loads with testimonials section
Testimonials carousel shows 9 cards (3 from DB + 6 static)
Contact page loads with all form elements (data-testid: contact-name, contact-email, contact-subject, contact-message, contact-submit)
Contact form submission works - sends email
Feedback page loads with star rating (data-testid: rating-star-1 through rating-star-5)
Feedback form submission works - shows success toast 'Thank you for your feedback! It will appear on our homepage.'
Profile page loads with profile picture container and camera icon (data-testid: change-picture-btn)
Profile page shows name edit with save button (data-testid: save-name-btn)
Profile page shows email section with Change Email button (data-testid: change-email-btn)
Profile page shows interview stats (9 Total Interviews, 1 Completed, Mar 2026 Member Since)
Change Email flow - clicking Change Email shows new email input and Send OTP button
Navbar shows profile picture when user has one uploaded
Profile picture URL correctly resolved with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL prefix

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: LiveInterview.js had toggleCamera function incorrectly placed inside useEffect block (lines 151-158) - fixed code formatting
LiveInterview fullscreen video re-attach useEffect correctly watches isFullscreen and re-sets videoRef.current.srcObject = streamRef.current
Navbar.js correctly resolves profile picture URL with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL prefix for relative paths
AuthContext.js has refreshUser function that Profile.js calls after picture upload or email change
seed_data_creation: Created test feedbacks via POST /api/feedback during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested 4 NEW tasks: (1) Contact form - POST /api/contact sends email to admin (arghyanilryzen@gmail.com) + copy to user via Gmail SMTP, (2) Feedback form - POST /api/feedback saves to MongoDB 'feedbacks' collection with auto-approved=true, GET /api/feedbacks returns approved feedbacks which are merged with static testimonials on Landing page, (3) Profile picture - POST /api/profile/upload-picture saves to /uploads/ and returns URL like /api/recordings/avatar_{user_id}_{uuid}.{ext}, picture shows in navbar via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL prefix, (4) Change email with OTP - POST /api/profile/change-email/send-otp sends OTP to new email, POST /api/profile/change-email/verify validates OTP and updates email. Profile page shows interview stats (total_interviews, completed_interviews, created_at). LiveInterview fullscreen video re-attach code was fixed (formatting bug). All features working correctly.

contact_form.status: REAL - sends actual email via Gmail SMTP

feedback_form.status: REAL - saves to MongoDB, sends email notification

change_email_otp.status: REAL - sends OTP via Gmail SMTP

profile_stats.status: REAL - counts from MongoDB interviews collection

live_interview_fullscreen_fix.fix: useEffect watches isFullscreen and re-attaches streamRef.current to videoRef.current.srcObject
